redis.clients.jedis.commands

Interface RedisModulePipelineCommands

  • All Superinterfaces:
    BloomFilterPipelineCommands, CountMinSketchPipelineCommands, CuckooFilterPipelineCommands, RedisBloomPipelineCommands, RediSearchPipelineCommands, RedisGraphPipelineCommands, RedisJsonPipelineCommands, RedisTimeSeriesPipelineCommands, TDigestSketchPipelineCommands, TopKFilterPipelineCommands
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    ClusterPipeline, MultiNodePipelineBase, Pipeline, ReliableTransaction, ShardedPipeline, Transaction, TransactionBase

    public interface RedisModulePipelineCommands
extends RediSearchPipelineCommands, RedisJsonPipelineCommands, RedisTimeSeriesPipelineCommands, RedisBloomPipelineCommands, RedisGraphPipelineCommands
